heroInsight: Carousels are dominating with an avg engagement score of 16029 from top posts, making them the must-use format for maximum reach.

data.name: Reel

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes; focus on shareable content.
Saves are 25% of ranking power; encourage followers to save carousels.
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels reach; hook immediately.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned; prioritize unique content.
Carousels have massive save rates rivaling Reels; prioritize for engagement.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Leverage trending audio in Reels to enhance discoverability — sync with beats.
Encourage comment threads with open-ended questions in captions.
Optimize Reels for 3-second hooks to maximize retention and shares.

tiktokCrossover.summary: TikTok trends like #musclebuilding and #bulk are surging and not yet saturated on IG.
